channel.title: Arjun Thakur — AI Engineering Blog
channel.description: Technical articles on agentic AI, LangGraph, RAG, voice agents, FastAPI, and production AI engineering by Arjun Thakur, Principal AI Engineer.

item.title: How Does a Machine Learn? The Intuition Behind Linear Regression
item.description: A beginner-friendly walkthrough of linear regression from a demo session at Masai School: predict a salary from years of experience, guess the line y = mx + c, and see how a machine learns by reducing its error — ending with the intuition behind gradient descent.
item.author: arjun@arjunthakur.dev (Arjun Thakur)

item.title: How Exa Search Found Me — GEO Part 2
item.description: A neural (embeddings-based) search engine surfaced my name to a cold prospect who then emailed me. Part 2 of my GEO series: what Exa is, an inventory of everything I've shipped for SEO and GEO to date, and the identity-ownership step most people miss — rel=me, sameAs, and an ownership statement in llms.txt.
item.author: arjun@arjunthakur.dev (Arjun Thakur)

item.title: Agents Don't Fail Like Services Fail — And We're Not Tooled For It
item.description: A microservice dies loudly — a 500, alerting, a tripped circuit breaker. An agent fails silently, synthesizing confidently on top of garbage or burning tokens in a reasoning loop. Building a multi-agent stock recommender exposed the gap in agent reliability tooling — and the gateway and chaos harness I'm building for it.
item.author: arjun@arjunthakur.dev (Arjun Thakur)

item.title: How I Optimized My Site for LLMs (GEO)
item.description: A condensed, practical guide to Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) — how I made my portfolio findable and citable by ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity, with real code. The site is open source.
item.author: arjun@arjunthakur.dev (Arjun Thakur)

item.title: Two Agent Stacks, One Problem: A2A/MCP on Bedrock vs. LangGraph
item.description: Shipping two agentic systems on deliberately different foundations — native AWS Bedrock with A2A/MCP vs. LangGraph + LangChain. What actually differed under the hood: orchestration, evals, and grounding.
item.author: arjun@arjunthakur.dev (Arjun Thakur)

item.title: JWT Authentication in Spring Boot + React: Complete Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to implementing secure JWT authentication in Spring Boot with a React frontend. Covers token generation, validation, refresh tokens, and production security best practices.
item.author: arjun@arjunthakur.dev (Arjun Thakur)
